title: Make theme extraction fallback provider order configurable
body:
## Context

From PR #223 code review (fingerprint: `7d831ce08f9b50c636fd31cfd8068da7`)

## Problem

The fallback provider selection logic in `createThemeExtractor` is hardcoded with a fixed priority order [`anthropic`, `openai`, `gemini`]. This creates an implicit preference that may not match all deployment scenarios.

## Suggested Improvements

1. Extract fallback provider order to configuration:
   ```yaml
   themeExtraction:
     fallbackProviders: ["openai", "anthropic", "gemini"]
   ```
2. Keep sensible default if not specified
3. Allow users to customize based on cost/performance/reliability

## Priority

Low - enhancement for flexibility.

## Related

- PR #223: Theme extraction feature
- Issue #227: Fallback provider behavior documentation
